personal.title: Technical Product Manager | Data-Driven Decision Making | Startup Environments
personal.summary: Engineer-to-PM with 3+ years bridging product strategy and engineering execution in startup and high-scale environments, skilled in data analysis (SQL, Python) and cross-functional collaboration across design, engineering, and business teams. Shipped 15+ product features at early-stage SaaS startup (5K+ MAU) and internal tooling adopted by 200+ stakeholders at Stripe, with a track record of data-driven decision making backed by quantified outcomes. Transitioning focus from engineering execution to product ownership to leverage deep technical fluency in defining roadmaps and aligning go-to-market strategy.

experience.title: Software Engineer (Product & Platform)
bullets: Drove stakeholder communication and alignment by building a real-time transaction monitoring dashboard (React/TypeScript) adopted by 200+ engineers for incident response and data-driven decision making.
Led cross-functional product initiative to migrate billing infrastructure to event-driven architecture (Kafka/Go), reducing P99 latency by 40% and unblocking 3 downstream product teams.
Analyzed platform usage data to inform product roadmap priorities, maintaining 99.99% uptime SLA across 50K+ requests/sec payment pipeline.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through onboarding and collaborative code review, improving team velocity and knowledge sharing.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern (Analytics Platform)
bullets: Collaborated cross-functionally with product and design teams to define and ship A/B test features for checkout optimization, driving a 2.1% conversion rate increase with $50M+ GMV impact.
Analyzed merchant usage patterns to identify performance bottlenecks; implemented Redis caching strategy that reduced database load by 35% and dashboard load time from 2.4s to 0.8s.
Rebuilt merchant analytics API (REST → GraphQL) based on data-driven analysis of query patterns, improving performance 3x for 10K+ daily active merchants.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer (Technical Co-owner)
bullets: Co-owned product backlog and sprint planning with PM and design in a startup environment, shipping 15+ features over 12 months to grow platform from 0 to 5K+ monthly active users.
Defined API product strategy and roadmap for customer-facing analytics dashboard (Next.js/PostgreSQL), handling 10K+ daily API calls with <200ms response time SLA.
Drove go-to-market execution by reducing deployment cycle time from 45 min to 8 min via CI/CD pipeline, enabling weekly feature releases aligned with customer feedback cycles.

items.title: httpbench (Open Source CLI Tool)
items.description: Go-based HTTP benchmarking CLI with concurrent workers, latency histograms, and percentile reporting. 800+ GitHub stars.

items.title: MediSync (Hackathon — 1st Place, CalHacks 2021)
items.description: Real-time patient triage system using WebSockets and ML-based priority scoring. Built in 36 hours with a team of 4.
